Mini Workshop Series at KHAS School of Foreign Languages: Creative Ideas and Classroom Strategies

On August 19–20, the Mini Workshop Series at Khas SFL brought instructors of prep school and creative ideas together. With refreshing and thought provoking sessions like “The Art of Interaction” by Canberk İzmirden, “Purposeful Use of Kahoot & Google Docs” by Gila Gözlüklü, “Effective Time Management in 50-Minute English Lessons” by Şule Öztekin, “How Stories Can Spark Real Conversations” by Gül Ulu, “Effective Monitoring in ESL Classrooms” by Berna Bayram, “Unmute Your Classroom” by Bedi Cananoğlu, “In-class Feedback for Deeper Understanding” by Feyza Öner, and “Transforming Silent Animations into Voiced Narratives” by Arev Babahan, participants enjoyed two days full of practical strategies and hands-on ideas to enhance their classroom experiences.
